dialogue.line: Babar bhai, do you even know what an API is?
Of course I do Virat. I've hit more APIs than you've hit centuries lately.
Very funny. Okay genius, explain it then.
An API is like a waiter at a restaurant. You tell the waiter what you want, he goes to the kitchen, brings back your food.
That's actually not bad. The waiter is the middleman between you and the kitchen.
Exactly! Your app is you, the API is the waiter, and the server is the kitchen. You don't walk into the kitchen yourself.
And the menu is like API documentation. It tells you what you can order.
See? Even a guy who can't play spin understands APIs.
At least I show up in World Cup finals.
Okay okay, let's just focus on the code bhai.
